items.title_en: US and Iran begin talks on initial peace deal in Switzerland

items.desc_en: The face-to-face meeting follows ongoing fighting in Lebanon and Iran's claim to have shut the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 此次面对面会议是在黎巴嫩持续战斗以及伊朗声称已关闭霍尔木兹海峡之后举行的。

items.title_en: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
items.title_zh: 提高最低工资是一个巨大的政治赢家。现在遇到了阻力
items.desc_en: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box, but recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.
items.desc_zh: 提高最低工资一直是投票箱中进步政策的赢家，但最近的失败表明经济情绪放缓了其政治势头。

items.title_en: Tight security as Indian students resit medical exam after alleged paper leak
items.title_zh: 印度学生因涉嫌试卷泄露而重新接受体检，安保严密
items.desc_en: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.
items.desc_zh: 由于部署了空军来保护试卷，数百万考生面临生物识别检查和搜身。

items.title_en: Dutch royals enjoy two big results in one World Cup day
items.title_zh: 荷兰皇室在世界杯的一天内取得了两项重大成果
items.desc_en: There may be about 5,000 miles between the Netherlands and their former colony Curacao but members of the Dutch royal family managed to see both sides play on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 荷兰与其前殖民地库拉索岛之间可能相距约 5,000 英里，但荷兰王室成员设法观看了双方周六的比赛。

items.title_en: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free
items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能公司免费清洁我的纽约公寓
items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_en: Why the social media ban is about so much more than social media
items.title_zh: 为什么社交媒体禁令的意义远不止社交媒体
items.desc_en: If we are witnessing a profound shift in the online space, how will it reshape our relationship with it? Technology and AI editor Zoe Kleinman writes.
items.desc_zh: 如果我们目睹网络空间的深刻转变，它将如何重塑我们与网络的关系？技术和人工智能编辑 Zoe Kleinman 写道。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes kill six people in Gaza including Al Jazeera cameraman, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列空袭导致加沙六人死亡，其中包括半岛电视台摄影师
items.desc_en: The Israeli military accused Ahmed Wishah of being a "Hamas sniper operative", without providing evidence.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方指责艾哈迈德·维沙是“哈马斯狙击手”，但没有提供证据。

items.title_en: New video game console aims to get kids moving
items.title_zh: 新视频游戏机旨在让孩子们动起来
items.desc_en: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
items.desc_zh: 这款立方体形状的游戏机将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.title_en: GTA 6 - all you need to know about Rockstar's blockbuster game
items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.
items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。

items.title_en: The artificial ice pyramids saving India's mountain villages
items.title_zh: 人造冰金字塔拯救了印度的山村
items.desc_en: Himalayan villages are creating artificial glaciers to guarantee water for their crops in the spring.
items.desc_zh: 喜马拉雅山的村庄正在建造人工冰川，以保证春季农作物的用水。

items.title_en: GTA 6 pre-order date and cover art revealed by Rockstar
items.title_zh: Rockstar 公布《GTA 6》预购日期和封面艺术
items.desc_en: The developer has said pre-sales of the hugely anticipated game will begin on 25 June.
items.desc_zh: 开发商表示，这款备受期待的游戏将于 6 月 25 日开始预售。

items.title_en: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.title_zh: Amon创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.desc_zh: 桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai)、黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 和杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 与 BBC 分享了他们的建议。

items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题
